originalTitle: Sandisk’s and Micron’s stocks sink as the rotation trade builds, but supply shortages should limit losses
summary: Most of Sandisk’s annual revenue could eventually come from its new business model contracts that provide better visibility, BofA said.
content: Most of Sandisk’s annual revenue could eventually come from its new business model contracts that provide better visibility, BofA said.
chineseTitle: 随着轮换交易的增加，闪迪和美光的股价下跌，但供应短缺应该会限制损失
chineseSummary: 美国银行表示，Sandisk 的大部分年收入最终可能来自其提供更好可见性的新业务模式合同。
chineseContent: 美国银行表示，Sandisk 的大部分年收入最终可能来自其提供更好可见性的新业务模式合同。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
